title: Smoke Stack
lore: Every set gets a cowbell count-in — Smoke Shift vents the 808 through a smoke stack between reps.
artistPersona: Warehouse phonk producer — cowbell through a smoke stack, 808 bass tuned for deadlifts not hairpins. Gym-floor aggression over touge romance.
albumConcept: Smoke Shift's warehouse phonk — cowbell counts reps, 808 counts sets, smoke counts nothing because it's always on.
